scripts.build:wechat: npm run typecheck && WECHAT_BUILD_PROFILE=release VITE_WECHAT_DEBUG=0 vite build --config vite.wechat.config.ts && WECHAT_BUILD_PROFILE=release node tools/build-wechat.mjs
scripts.build:wechat:debug: npm run typecheck && WECHAT_BUILD_PROFILE=debug VITE_WECHAT_DEBUG=1 vite build --config vite.wechat.config.ts && WECHAT_BUILD_PROFILE=debug node tools/build-wechat.mjs
